title: geum urbanum var. hirtum
intro: Geum urbanum var. hirtum, also known as hairy avens, is a perennial plant species within the Geum genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's roots and leaves have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are believed to have health benefits including lowering blood pressure and reducing stress. Additionally, hairy avens has been used to support digestive health and as a natural remedy for colds and fever.
